title: Authorizing HTTP communications with S3 buckets is security sensitive
description: Checks for direct HTTP communication with Amazon S3 buckets, which is a security sensitive practice.
message: Direct HTTP access to Amazon S3 bucket detected.
recommendation: Use a secure method such as AWS SDK to communicate with S3.

noncompliant.code:
import boto3
s3 = boto3.client('s3')
s3.put_object(Bucket='my-bucket', Key='my-key', Body='my-data')
noncompliant.description: Insecure HTTP communication with S3 bucket.

compliant.description: Secure communication with S3 bucket using AWS SDK.

why_is_this_an_issue: Direct HTTP access to S3 buckets can expose sensitive data and increase the attack surface.
how_to_fix: Use a secure method such as AWS SDK to communicate with S3.

logic.new_check_type_doc: Checks if a call is made to boto3.client('s3') or s3, indicating direct HTTP communication with S3.

metadata.title: Authorizing HTTP communications with S3 buckets is security sensitive
